title: clitoria laurifolia f. glabrior
intro: Clitoria laurifolia f. glabrior, also known as the purple butterfly pea or Asian pigeonwings, is a perennial vine or shrub belonging to the legume family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clitoria laurifolia f. glabrior include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
